ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trial_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial protocol */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "blinding_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blinding type for the trial protocol */,
  "discontinued_flag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discontinued flag for the trial protocol */,
  "effective_datetime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the effective datetime for the trial protocol */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor for the trial protocol */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator for the trial protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_protocols_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("principal_investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_protocols_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_protocol_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial protocol the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property (e.g., varchar, datetime) */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the property */,
  "nullable" INTEGER /* Whether the property is nullable */,
  "fixed_length" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a fixed length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_protocol_properties_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES trial_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "trial_protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial protocol the patient is enrolled in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_trial_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_protocol_id") REFERENCES trial_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "trial_protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial protocol the outcome belongs to */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Value of the outcome */,
  "outcome_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_outcomes_trial_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_protocol_id") REFERENCES trial_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "trial_protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial protocol the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_documents_trial_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_protocol_id") REFERENCES trial_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "trial_protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial protocol the submission belongs to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission */,
  "regulatory_authority" TEXT /* Regulatory authority for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_submissions_trial_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_protocol_id") REFERENCES trial_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blinding_types" (
  "blinding_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blinding type */,
  "blinding_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the blinding type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blinding type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blinding_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discontinued_flags" (
  "discontinued_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discontinued flag */,
  "discontinued_flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the discontinued flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discontinued flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discontinued_flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effective_datetimes" (
  "effective_datetime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effective datetime */,
  "effective_datetime_name" TEXT /* Name of the effective datetime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effective datetime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effective_datetime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "trial_protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial protocol the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_trial_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_protocol_id") REFERENCES trial_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabularies" (
  "vocabulary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_name" TEXT /* Name of the vocabulary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabulary_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "vocabulary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vocabulary the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property (e.g., varchar, datetime) */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the property */,
  "nullable" INTEGER /* Whether the property is nullable */,
  "fixed_length" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a fixed length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "principal_investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_investigator_id")
)
